targets.rawSql:
;WITH unique_records AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Part Type],
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        [Status],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))       AS material_clean,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))      AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))     AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))            AS mc_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))           AS mold_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))         AS qc_member_val,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Production Date [S]]])) AS prod_date,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Production Time]))   AS prod_time
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]

    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Material No.] IS NOT NULL
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.])) != ''
        AND CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR(10))
                IN (${year:singlequote})
        AND CASE CAST([Month Record] AS INT)
                WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
            END IN (${month:singlequote})
        AND (
            LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})
            OR 'All' IN (${mold_no:singlequote})
        )
),
-- ✅ CTE นับ: เหมือน Query เดิม 100% — ไม่มี breakdown columns
ng_lot_for_count AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        material_clean
    FROM unique_records
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Status])) = 'NG'
),
-- ✅ นับ NG Lot Count เหมือนเดิม 100%
ng_count AS (
    SELECT
        material_clean,
        COUNT(*) AS ng_lot_count
    FROM ng_lot_for_count
    GROUP BY material_clean
),
-- ✅ CTE breakdown: แยกออกมาต่างหาก ไม่กระทบการนับ
ng_lot_breakdown AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        material_clean,
        lot_material,
        condition_std,
        mc_no,
        mold_no,
        qc_member_val,
        prod_date + ' ' + prod_time AS prod_datetime
    FROM unique_records
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Status])) = 'NG'
),
-- ✅ DISTINCT แยกทีละ field กัน duplicate
d_lot AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT material_clean, lot_material
    FROM ng_lot_breakdown
),
d_cond AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT material_clean, condition_std
    FROM ng_lot_breakdown
),
d_mc AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT material_clean, mc_no
    FROM ng_lot_breakdown
),
d_mold AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT material_clean, mold_no
    FROM ng_lot_breakdown
),
d_qc AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT material_clean, qc_member_val
    FROM ng_lot_breakdown
),
-- ✅ Production Date+Time ไม่ deduplicate คงไว้ทั้งหมด
d_datetime AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT material_clean, prod_datetime
    FROM ng_lot_breakdown
),
agg_lot AS (
    SELECT material_clean,
           STRING_AGG(lot_material,  ' / ') AS lot_material_agg
    FROM d_lot GROUP BY material_clean
),
agg_cond AS (
    SELECT material_clean,
           STRING_AGG(condition_std, ' / ') AS condition_std_agg
    FROM d_cond GROUP BY material_clean
),
agg_mc AS (
    SELECT material_clean,
           STRING_AGG(mc_no,         ' / ') AS mc_no_agg
    FROM d_mc GROUP BY material_clean
),
agg_mold AS (
    SELECT material_clean,
           STRING_AGG(mold_no,       ' / ') AS mold_no_agg
    FROM d_mold GROUP BY material_clean
),
agg_qc AS (
    SELECT material_clean,
           STRING_AGG(qc_member_val, ' / ') AS qc_member_agg
    FROM d_qc GROUP BY material_clean
),
agg_datetime AS (
    SELECT material_clean,
           STRING_AGG(prod_datetime, ' / ') AS prod_datetime_agg
    FROM d_datetime GROUP BY material_clean
)
SELECT
    nc.material_clean         AS [Material No.],
    nc.ng_lot_count           AS [NG Lot Count],
    al.lot_material_agg       AS [Lot Material],
    ac.condition_std_agg      AS [Condition STD],
    am.mc_no_agg              AS [M/C No.],
    amo.mold_no_agg           AS [Mold No.],
    aq.qc_member_agg          AS [QC Member],
    adt.prod_datetime_agg     AS [Production Date + Time]
FROM ng_count             AS nc
LEFT JOIN agg_lot         AS al  ON al.material_clean  = nc.material_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_cond        AS ac  ON ac.material_clean  = nc.material_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_mc          AS am  ON am.material_clean  = nc.material_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_mold        AS amo ON amo.material_clean = nc.material_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_qc          AS aq  ON aq.material_clean  = nc.material_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_datetime    AS adt ON adt.material_clean = nc.material_clean
ORDER BY nc.ng_lot_count DESC

panels.title: MATERIAL NG RATE COUNT BY LOT

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR(10)) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 1 DESC
list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR(10)) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.definition:
SELECT value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        CASE CAST([Month Record] AS INT)
            WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb'
            WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar' WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr'
            WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
            WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug'
            WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep' WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct'
            WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
        END AS value,
        CAST([Month Record] AS INT) AS sort_order
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE [Month Record] IS NOT NULL
) AS t
ORDER BY sort_order
list.label: Month
list.name: month
list.query:
SELECT value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        CASE CAST([Month Record] AS INT)
            WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb'
            WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar' WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr'
            WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
            WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug'
            WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep' WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct'
            WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
        END AS value,
        CAST([Month Record] AS INT) AS sort_order
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE [Month Record] IS NOT NULL
) AS t
ORDER BY sort_order

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: mold_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
